title: Opening for Software Engineer at mfine Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at mfine Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at mfine Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About mfine Global Group:
mfine Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine Global Group!
